name: Gumroad
description: Creator commerce platform for selling digital products, memberships, and subscriptions. Manage products, track sales analytics, verify software licenses, and handle subscriber relationships.

capabilities.name: list_products
capabilities.description: Retrieve all products for the authenticated user including their names, prices, URLs, sales counts, and publication status.

capabilities.name: get_product
capabilities.description: Fetch detailed information about a specific product including description, pricing tiers, variants, and custom fields.

capabilities.name: create_product
capabilities.description: Create a new digital product on Gumroad with a name, price, description, and optional file or URL for delivery.

capabilities.name: list_sales
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of sales for the authenticated user, with optional filtering by date range, product, and email.

capabilities.name: verify_license
capabilities.description: Verify a software license key for a product to check its validity, uses remaining, and associated purchase details.

capabilities.name: list_subscribers
capabilities.description: Retrieve active subscribers for a specific product, including their status, payment amounts, and subscription dates.
